title: BlockClassification
description: Output of block_segmentation_fallback — type + per-type metadata for an ambiguous chunk (spec §3.5, §4.1.3).

metadata.description: Per-type metadata. Exact shape depends on `type` — see spec §3.5. Unknown fields are ignored by the caller.

confidence.description: Optional self-rated confidence (0–1). Callers may prefer a re-run or flag-for-review when < 0.5.
